tooling_sandboxing.detail: SkillHub is a skill package registry/discovery platform (Spring Boot + Postgres + Redis), not an execution engine — it stores and versions skill packages but does not run them.

context_memory.detail: As a registry (search, versioning, RBAC, audit logging) it has no agent conversation or task-context concept to manage.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: No tool-call interception surface — the product's lifecycle is publish/discover/version, not agent execution.

prompt_optimization.detail: No prompt tuning or system-prompt injection feature; it manages skill package metadata, not prompt content.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: Self-hosted-only enterprise registry you deploy on your own infrastructure (Docker Compose/Kubernetes, "full data sovereignty") with RBAC and namespaces to configure — an opinionated runtime you run yourself.
